# Installation
> `npm install --save @types/svg-path-bbox`

# Summary
This package contains type definitions for svg-path-bbox (https://github.com/mondeja/svg-path-bbox#readme).

# Details
Files were exported from https://github.com/DefinitelyTyped/DefinitelyTyped/tree/master/types/svg-path-bbox.
## [index.d.ts](https://github.com/DefinitelyTyped/DefinitelyTyped/tree/master/types/svg-path-bbox/index.d.ts)
````ts
// Type definitions for svg-path-bbox 1.0
// Project: https://github.com/mondeja/svg-path-bbox#readme
// Definitions by: Piotr Błażejewicz <https://github.com/peterblazejewicz>
// Definitions: https://github.com/DefinitelyTyped/DefinitelyTyped
// Minimum TypeScript Version: 4.0

/**
 * Computes the bounding box of SVG path following the SVG 1.1 specification.
 * @param path SVG path.
 */
declare function svgPathBbox(path: string): svgPathBbox.BoundingBox;

declare namespace svgPathBbox {
    type BoundingBox = [minx: number, miny: number, maxx: number, maxy: number];
}

export = svgPathBbox;

````
